description.en: All relevant data sources — internal systems, editorial databases, and external datasets — must be retrievable and accessible to the implementation team.
description.zh: 所有相關資料來源——包括內部系統、編輯資料庫及外部資料集——必須能夠被實作團隊檢索與存取。

description.en: Data sources must be connectable within a shared environment. Siloed systems that cannot exchange data programmatically will block cross-source modelling regardless of data availability.
description.zh: 資料來源必須能夠在共享環境中互相連接。無法以程式化方式交換資料的孤立系統，無論資料本身是否可用，都將阻礙跨來源的建模工作。

description.en: Using AI-driven analytical tools to process large volumes of unstructured data, uncover trends and anomalies, and develop impactful news stories.
description.zh: 使用AI驅動的分析工具處理大量非結構化資料、挖掘趨勢與異常，並發展具影響力的新聞報導。

displayName.zh: 現有文章與內部檔案庫

items.en: Full text of past investigative reports, editorial notes, published articles, and associated metadata
items.zh: 過往調查報導全文、編輯筆記、已發布文章及相關元資料

displayName.zh: 公共記錄與結構化資料

items.en: Government registries, corporate filings, court rulings, open-data portals, and statistical datasets
items.zh: 政府登記資料、企業申報文件、法院裁決、開放資料平台與統計資料集

items.en: Photographs and video footage for identity verification and visual evidence
items.zh: 用於身份驗證和視覺證據的照片和影片

items.en: Subject-matter experts available for fact identification, hypothesis formation, and validation
items.zh: 可用於事實識別、假設形成與驗證的主題專家

modellingProcess.en: Facial recognition, image matching, identity cross-referencing against public records
modellingProcess.zh: 人臉識別、圖像比對、依據公共記錄進行身份交叉核對

modelOutput.en: Identity match reports with confidence scores
modelOutput.zh: 附有信心分數的身份比對報告

modellingProcess.en: Entity extraction, association and anomaly detection, cross-language document matching
modellingProcess.zh: 實體提取、關聯性與異常偵測、跨語言文件比對

modelOutput.en: Entity relationship networks and anomaly reports
modelOutput.zh: 實體關係網絡與異常報告

content.en: When no ready-made data source exists, web scraping is required. Modern websites commonly employ anti-scraping mechanisms; manageable at small scale, but a data provider may be needed for larger volumes.
content.zh: 當沒有現成的資料來源時，需要進行網頁爬取。現代網站普遍採用反爬蟲機制；小規模尚可處理，但較大規模時可能需要借助資料供應商。

content.en: Data arriving in different formats requires corresponding specialised tools for cleaning and transformation.
content.zh: 以不同格式傳入的資料需要對應的專業工具進行清理與轉換。

content.en: Using AI to explore data requires guarding against hallucinations; an evidence-based approach must be adopted to verify factual sources.
content.zh: 使用AI進行資料探索時，需防範幻覺問題；必須採用以證據為基礎的方法來驗證事實來源。

content.en: Matching documents across languages (e.g., Chinese and English company registrations, foreign-language court rulings) demands attention to proper-noun consistency and translation quality.
content.zh: 跨語言文件比對（例如中英文公司登記、外語法院裁決）需要特別注意專有名詞的一致性與翻譯品質。

content.en: Data must be de-identified before being sent to an LLM, or a local model should be used instead. Compliance with Taiwan's Personal Data Protection Act must also be ensured.
content.zh: 資料在傳送至LLM之前必須進行去識別化處理，或改用本地模型。同時須確保符合台灣《個人資料保護法》的相關規定。

description.en: Using AI to analyse and synthesise large datasets, enhancing visual storytelling to create more engaging content that reaches a broader audience.
description.zh: 使用AI分析與整合大型資料集，強化視覺化敘事，創作更具吸引力的內容，觸達更廣泛的受眾。

items.en: Full text of past articles, headlines, tags, publication date, author, category
items.zh: 過往文章全文、標題、標籤、發布日期、作者、類別

items.en: Government open data, statistical datasets, geographic and regional data
items.zh: 政府開放資料、統計資料集、地理與區域資料

items.en: Social media posts, third-party data providers
items.zh: 社群媒體貼文、第三方資料供應商

items.en: Subject matter experts available for feature definition and model validation
items.zh: 可用於功能定義與模型驗證的主題專家

name.zh: 資料驅動的視覺化敘事

modellingProcess.en: Structured data cleaning, feature extraction, interactive chart generation
modellingProcess.zh: 結構化資料清理、特徵提取、互動圖表生成

modelOutput.en: Embeddable interactive data visualisations
modelOutput.zh: 可嵌入的互動式資料視覺化

modellingProcess.en: Spam filtering, full-article semantic encoding, sentiment classification
modellingProcess.zh: 垃圾訊息過濾、全文語義編碼、情緒分類

modelOutput.en: Sentiment trend charts by political figure
modelOutput.zh: 按政治人物分類的情緒趨勢圖表

modellingProcess.en: Feature engineering, prediction models (logistic regression / tree-based), expert validation
modellingProcess.zh: 特徵工程、預測模型（邏輯迴歸／樹狀模型）、專家驗證

modelOutput.en: Predictive hotspot maps with confidence intervals
modelOutput.zh: 附有信心區間的預測熱點地圖

content.en: A standardized test set must be established, covering common cases and edge cases with human annotations, in order to evaluate the accuracy of different models.
content.zh: 必須建立標準化測試集，涵蓋常見案例與邊緣案例並附人工標注，以評估不同模型的準確性。

content.en: Sentiment models are typically trained on predefined datasets such as tweets; differences in context can significantly affect model performance. A recommended approach is to use an LLM for classification. For volumes at the 100k level, the cost is not prohibitive.
content.zh: 情緒模型通常在推文等預定義資料集上訓練；情境差異可能顯著影響模型表現。建議使用LLM進行分類。對於10萬筆規模的資料量，成本並非難以承受。

content.en: Predictive insights are highly dependent on domain knowledge, requiring deep involvement from domain experts at every stage: data collection (identifying useful data), feature engineering (injecting prior knowledge), and performance evaluation and calibration.
content.zh: 預測洞察高度依賴領域知識，需要領域專家在每個階段深度參與：資料蒐集（識別有用資料）、特徵工程（注入先驗知識），以及績效評估與校準。

content.en: Using generative models can reduce reliance on domain experts, as distribution parameters can be designed based on historically similar events.
content.zh: 使用生成式模型可降低對領域專家的依賴，因為分布參數可以根據歷史上的類似事件來設計。

content.en: Taiwanese readers consume news heavily on mobile devices, making the interaction experience and loading speed of interactive visualizations on mobile a practical challenge that must be addressed.
content.zh: 台灣讀者大量透過行動裝置閱讀新聞，使互動式視覺化在行動端的操作體驗與載入速度成為必須解決的實際挑戰。

description.en: Integrating AI into the content moderation workflow for fact-checking and source verification, ensuring information accuracy before publication and enhancing reader trust.
description.zh: 將AI整合到內容審核工作流程中，用於事實查核與來源驗證，確保發布前的資訊準確性，並增強讀者信任。

items.en: Draft or published articles pending verification
items.zh: 待驗證的草稿或已發布文章

items.en: Headlines, publication date, author, and category
items.zh: 標題、發布日期、作者及類別

items.en: Established fact databases and reference repositories
items.zh: 已建立的事實資料庫與參考資料庫

items.en: Trusted source whitelists (e.g., verified accounts, specific topic tags)
items.zh: 可信來源白名單（例如已驗證帳號、特定主題標籤）

items.en: Social media posts (e.g., Twitter/X content for breaking news monitoring)
items.zh: 社群媒體貼文（如用於即時新聞監測的Twitter/X內容）

items.en: Third-party news sources and wire services
items.zh: 第三方新聞來源與通訊社

items.en: Editors available for human-in-the-loop confidence score review
items.zh: 可進行人在回路信心分數審查的編輯

items.en: Subject matter experts for edge-case verification
items.zh: 用於邊緣案例驗證的主題專家

modellingProcess.en: Entity extraction from article text; comparison against fact databases; confidence scoring with human-in-the-loop review
modellingProcess.zh: 從文章文本提取實體；與事實資料庫比對；人在回路審查的信心評分

modelOutput.en: Fact-check annotations with confidence scores appended to articles
modelOutput.zh: 附有信心分數的事實查核標注，附加至文章中

modellingProcess.en: Whitelist-based spam filtering (tag or account selection); event detection; AI-assisted claim verification
modellingProcess.zh: 基於白名單的垃圾訊息過濾（標籤或帳號選擇）；事件偵測；AI輔助聲明驗證

modelOutput.en: Verified or flagged social media claims with source links
modelOutput.zh: 附有來源連結的已驗證或已標記社群媒體聲明

content.en: Social media platforms impose access restrictions, making consistent retrieval of content a persistent challenge. Whitelist-based approaches — such as filtering by verified accounts or specific hashtags — are more practical than broad-scope crawling.
content.zh: 社群媒體平台施加存取限制，使內容的持續擷取成為長期挑戰。以白名單為基礎的方法——例如按已驗證帳號或特定主題標籤篩選——比廣泛爬取更具實用性。

content.en: Reliable fact databases may not be updated in real time. For time-sensitive breaking news, real-time claim verification may still require manual editorial review, as automated cross-referencing against outdated databases can produce misleading confidence signals.
content.zh: 可靠的事實資料庫可能無法即時更新。對於時效性強的即時新聞，即時聲明驗證仍可能需要人工編輯審查，因為以過時資料庫進行自動交叉比對可能產生誤導性的信心訊號。

content.en: Implementing an agentic flow can automate the inspection and verification process end-to-end, extracting key claims and gathering potential evidence, then surfacing only the items requiring human judgment to editors. This reduces manual workload while preserving editorial oversight and accuracy.
content.zh: 實作代理流程可以端對端自動化檢查與驗證過程，提取關鍵聲明並蒐集潛在證據，然後僅將需要人工判斷的項目呈現給編輯。這在保留編輯監督與準確性的同時，減少了人工工作量。

content.en: Current AI fact-checking approaches tend to rely on existing user reputation signals (e.g., account credibility scores) for claim validation. This introduces a dependency on platform-specific metadata that may not be consistently available or transferable across sources.
content.zh: 目前AI事實查核方法傾向依賴現有使用者信譽訊號（例如帳號可信度評分）進行聲明驗證。這引入了對平台特定元資料的依賴，而這些元資料在不同來源間可能無法一致取得或移轉。

description.en: Adjusting content based on reader motivations, behaviours, and preferences to ensure more relevant and valuable information is delivered at the individual reader level.
description.zh: 根據讀者動機、行為與偏好調整內容，確保在個人讀者層面提供更相關、更有價值的資訊。

items.en: Full text of past articles, headlines, tags, publication date, author, category
items.zh: 過往文章全文、標題、標籤、發布日期、作者、類別

items.en: Click-through records, dwell time, reading patterns, engagement metrics (e.g. shares, comments)
items.zh: 點擊記錄、停留時間、閱讀模式、互動指標（如分享、評論）

items.en: Sufficient historical volume to move beyond cold-start; LLMs can partially mitigate early-stage data scarcity
items.zh: 足夠的歷史資料量以跨越冷啟動；LLM可部分緩解早期資料稀缺問題

items.en: A defined taxonomy for categorising reader intent and needs (e.g. Ringier-style user-needs model)
items.zh: 用於分類讀者意圖與需求的已定義分類法（如Ringier風格的使用者需求模型）

items.en: Must be finalised before system build, as it determines annotation standards, training objectives, and evaluation metrics
items.zh: 必須在系統建置前確定，因為它決定了標注標準、訓練目標和評估指標

items.en: Access to the content management system for low-latency inference and recommendation delivery
items.zh: 內容管理系統存取權，用於低延遲推論與推薦投遞

items.en: Ability to display confidence scores and fallback mechanisms to maintain editorial trust
items.zh: 能夠顯示信心分數和回退機制以維護編輯信任

items.en: Editorial staff available for framework validation, annotation quality control, and ongoing adoption feedback
items.zh: 可用於框架驗證、標注品質控制與持續採用回饋的編輯人員

modellingProcess.en: Framework definition, article annotation, classifier training, user-need labelling, metadata tagging
modellingProcess.zh: 框架定義、文章標注、分類器訓練、使用者需求標記、元資料標籤

modelOutput.en: Articles classified by reader need with auto-generated metadata tags
modelOutput.zh: 按讀者需求分類並附自動生成元資料標籤的文章

modellingProcess.en: SEO keyword extraction, click-through and semantic fidelity balancing, confidence scoring
modellingProcess.zh: SEO關鍵字提取、點擊率與語義忠實度平衡、信心評分

modelOutput.en: Optimised headline suggestions with confidence scores and consistent metadata tags
modelOutput.zh: 附有信心分數與一致元資料標籤的標題優化建議

modellingProcess.en: User profiling from behavioural signals, content-user matching, cold-start mitigation via LLM
modellingProcess.zh: 基於行為訊號的使用者分析、內容與使用者匹配、透過LLM緩解冷啟動

modelOutput.en: Personalised content recommendations per subscriber
modelOutput.zh: 每位訂閱者的個人化內容推薦

title.zh: 讀者意圖的結構化理解

content.en: The choice of classification framework directly determines annotation standards, model training objectives, and evaluation methods. However, if the pipeline is designed to be sufficiently modular, the framework itself becomes pluggable, and the cost of replacement and experimentation can be significantly reduced.
content.zh: 分類框架的選擇直接決定了標注標準、模型訓練目標和評估方法。然而，如果管線設計得足夠模組化，框架本身就可以成為可替換的元件，大幅降低替換與實驗的成本。

content.en: The upper bound of personalisation depends on how much user data the media organisation has access to. LLMs can provide a degree of mitigation during the cold-start phase but cannot replace the value of real behavioural data. The core challenge is that reader motivation cannot be measured directly — it can only be inferred indirectly through behavioural signals such as clicks and dwell time.
content.zh: 個人化的上限取決於媒體組織能夠存取多少使用者資料。LLM可以在冷啟動階段提供一定程度的緩解，但無法取代真實行為資料的價值。核心挑戰在於讀者動機無法直接測量——只能透過點擊和停留時間等行為訊號間接推斷。

title.zh: 相關性與多樣性之間的張力

content.en: Purely optimising for relevance risks creating filter bubbles. The editorial responsibility of media organisations means this objective cannot be measured solely by machine-learning metrics; it must be accounted for at the system-design level.
content.zh: 純粹優化相關性可能會造成過濾泡泡。媒體組織的編輯責任意味著這個目標不能僅以機器學習指標衡量；必須在系統設計層面加以考量。

content.en: For AI-generated suggestions to be genuinely integrated into workflows, editors must develop sufficient confidence in the system. Designing confidence-score displays and fallback mechanisms is recommended to prevent rapid erosion of trust caused by unstable recommendations.
content.zh: 要使AI生成的建議真正整合到工作流程中，編輯必須對系統建立足夠的信心。建議設計信心分數顯示和回退機制，以防止不穩定的推薦迅速侵蝕信任。

description.en: Generating keyword-rich headlines to improve search rankings and increase article traffic. Optimising social post timing, language, and content format to align with evolving platform algorithms and maximise social engagement.
description.zh: 生成關鍵字豐富的標題以提升搜尋排名並增加文章流量。優化社群發文的時機、語言和內容格式，以配合不斷演變的平台演算法並最大化社群互動。

items.en: Full text of articles, headlines, tags, publication date, author, category
items.zh: 文章全文、標題、標籤、發布日期、作者、類別

items.en: Google Search Console data (active search intent, keyword rankings) and Google Discover data (passive push logic, click-through rates)
items.zh: Google Search Console資料（主動搜尋意圖、關鍵字排名）和Google Discover資料（被動推播邏輯、點擊率）

items.en: Understanding of the fundamental difference between the two sources is essential, as their headline optimisation objectives can be mutually contradictory
items.zh: 理解這兩個來源的根本差異至關重要，因為其標題優化目標可能相互矛盾

displayName.zh: 社群媒體平台存取與分析

items.en: Posting access and historical engagement metrics (reach, clicks, shares, comments) from target platforms (e.g. Facebook)
items.zh: 目標平台（如Facebook）的發文存取權限與歷史互動指標（觸及率、點擊數、分享數、評論數）

items.en: Sufficient reach volume per post to support statistically reliable A/B testing
items.zh: 每篇貼文需有足夠的觸及量，以支持統計上可靠的A/B測試

items.en: Documented brand standards and examples of successful headlines to serve as reference for prompt parameterisation
items.zh: 已記錄的品牌標準與成功標題範例，作為提示詞參數化的參考

items.en: A systematic method for converting qualitative brand criteria into actionable, programmable constraints (scoring rubric)
items.zh: 將定性品牌標準轉化為可程式化約束的系統化方法（評分量表）

displayName.zh: 實驗與提示詞版本管理基礎設施

items.en: Version-controlled prompt registry to track iterations, parameter configurations, and associated performance data
items.zh: 版本控制的提示詞登錄表，用於追蹤迭代、參數設定與相關績效資料

items.en: Without systematic tracking, mixing prompt versions or diagnosing performance regressions becomes infeasible at scale
items.zh: 若缺乏系統化追蹤，混合提示詞版本或診斷效能退化在大規模下將變得不可行

modellingProcess.en: Search intent analysis, keyword extraction, brand-style parameterisation, multi-objective prompt design (Search vs. Discover)
modellingProcess.zh: 搜尋意圖分析、關鍵字提取、品牌風格參數化、多目標提示設計（Search vs. Discover）

modelOutput.en: SEO-optimised headline suggestions with brand-compliance scoring
modelOutput.zh: 附有品牌合規評分的SEO優化標題建議

useCases.referenceCase: Il Resto × FT Data Science SEO Headline Tool

modellingProcess.en: Historical engagement analysis, platform algorithm inference, optimal timing/format recommendation, A/B testing
modellingProcess.zh: 歷史互動分析、平台演算法推斷、最佳時機/格式推薦、A/B測試

modelOutput.en: Optimised social post recommendations (timing, language, format) with engagement predictions
modelOutput.zh: 優化的社群發文建議（時機、語言、格式）附互動預測

modellingProcess.en: Multi-objective optimisation across search and social channels, dynamic feature weighting by target channel, counterfactual analysis for attribution
modellingProcess.zh: 跨搜尋與社群管道的多目標優化、按目標管道動態調整特徵權重、歸因分析的反事實分析

modelOutput.en: Channel-specific content variants with performance attribution reports and automated feedback loop
modelOutput.zh: 針對特定管道的內容變體，附績效歸因報告與自動化回饋機制

content.en: Search engines (active intent / semantic matching) and recommendation systems (passive push / emotional triggers) have fundamentally opposing optimisation paths. The system must support a multi-objective optimisation architecture capable of dynamically switching the feature weights and constraints for headline generation based on the target channel.
content.zh: 搜尋引擎（主動意圖／語義匹配）和推薦系統（被動推播／情感觸發）具有根本相反的優化路徑。系統必須支援多目標優化架構，能夠根據目標管道動態切換標題生成的特徵權重和約束條件。

content.en: Brand style guides and content quality criteria are typically vague, qualitative descriptions that are difficult to translate directly into model parameters. A scoring rubric must be established to convert abstract brand standards into programmable constraints, enabling automated content quality gating.
content.zh: 品牌風格指南和內容品質標準通常是模糊的定性描述，難以直接轉化為模型參數。必須建立評分量表，將抽象的品牌標準轉化為可程式化的約束條件，實現內容品質的自動化把關。

content.en: Traffic performance is influenced by multiple collinear factors — article topic, publication timing, and platform algorithm drift — making traditional A/B testing highly prone to false-positive conclusions when sample sizes are insufficient. This challenge is particularly pronounced for small-to-medium-sized media organisations in Taiwan.
content.zh: 流量績效受多個共線因素影響——文章主題、發布時機和平台演算法漂移——使傳統A/B測試在樣本量不足時極易得出假陽性結論。這個挑戰對台灣中小型媒體組織尤為突出。

title.en: Engineering governance of the experiment loop

content.en: Ad-hoc testing cannot accumulate knowledge, and the lack of version management makes it difficult to trace and scale optimisation outcomes. An experiment lifecycle management system must be established to link prompt iterations, parameter configurations, and back-end performance data into an automated feedback and knowledge-accumulation mechanism.
content.zh: 臨時測試無法積累知識，缺乏版本管理使追蹤和規模化優化成果變得困難。必須建立實驗生命週期管理系統，將提示詞迭代、參數設定和後端績效資料連結成自動化回饋與知識積累機制。

description.en: Leveraging reader behaviour and AI to deliver individually relevant content recommendations and interactive experiences, including personalised push notifications and generative AI-powered question-answering over proprietary article archives.
description.zh: 運用讀者行為與AI提供個別相關的內容推薦和互動體驗，包括個人化推播通知和基於生成式AI的專有文章存檔問答。

items.en: Full text of articles, headlines, tags, publication date, author, category
items.zh: 文章全文、標題、標籤、發布日期、作者、類別

items.en: Content features (topic, format, length) required as initial signals for cold-start recommendation and RAG retrieval
items.zh: 內容特徵（主題、格式、長度）作為冷啟動推薦和RAG檢索的初始訊號

items.en: Reading history, notification click/dismiss records, bookmarked interests, dwell time
items.zh: 閱讀記錄、通知點擊/忽略記錄、書籤興趣、停留時間

items.en: Sufficient interaction volume to move beyond cold-start; for media with limited membership, demographic-based grouping is a more practical starting point
items.zh: 足夠的互動量以跨越冷啟動；對於會員數量有限的媒體，以人口統計分群作為更務實的起點

displayName.zh: 使用者個人資料／人口統計資料

items.en: Basic demographic attributes (age, location, device type) to serve as a fallback segmentation basis during data-sparse phases
items.zh: 基本人口統計屬性（年齡、地點、裝置類型），作為資料稀缺階段的備援分群基礎

items.en: Delivery system with permission management, capable of dynamic frequency control per user
items.zh: 具備權限管理、能夠動態控制每位使用者頻率的投遞系統

items.en: Once notification permission is revoked by a user, the channel is permanently lost; the infrastructure must treat permission retention as a first-class optimisation objective
items.zh: 一旦使用者撤銷通知權限，該管道將永久失去；基礎設施必須將權限留存視為首要優化目標

displayName.zh: 向量搜尋與檢索基礎設施

items.en: A hybrid search stack (vector + keyword) with a reranking layer for the RAG-based chatbot use case
items.zh: 用於基於RAG的聊天機器人應用情境的混合搜尋堆疊（向量＋關鍵字）與重新排序層

items.en: A chunking strategy for news articles that preserves contextual coherence without introducing excessive noise
items.zh: 保持上下文連貫性而不引入過多雜訊的新聞文章分塊策略

modellingProcess.en: Demographic-based cold-start segmentation, interest-vector clustering as data matures, dynamic push frequency control based on user response history
modellingProcess.zh: 基於人口統計的冷啟動分群、資料成熟後的興趣向量聚類、基於使用者回應歷史的動態推播頻率控制

modelOutput.en: Personalised article recommendations with individually optimised push timing and frequency
modelOutput.zh: 個人化文章推薦，附有個別優化的推播時機和頻率

name.zh: 生成式AI聊天機器人（RAG問答）

modellingProcess.en: Temporal query parsing, hybrid search (vector + keyword), reranking, LLM generation with explicit attribution mechanism, contradiction handling strategy
modellingProcess.zh: 時間查詢解析、混合搜尋（向量＋關鍵字）、重新排序、附明確歸因機制的LLM生成、矛盾處理策略

modelOutput.en: Summary-based answers with verifiable source citations and confidence indicators
modelOutput.zh: 基於摘要的答案，附有可驗證的來源引用和信心指標

modellingProcess.en: Content-feature extraction, bandit-style online learning, dynamic balance mechanism between relevance and diversity to mitigate filter bubbles
modellingProcess.zh: 內容特徵提取、老虎機式線上學習、相關性與多樣性之間的動態平衡機制以緩解過濾泡泡

modelOutput.en: Diversified content recommendations with tuneable exploration ratio and engagement feedback loop
modelOutput.zh: 多樣化內容推薦，附有可調節的探索比例和互動回饋機制

content.en: If personalised recommendations over-rely on historical behaviour, they reinforce existing preferences and narrow the content surface (filter bubble), ultimately reducing long-term engagement. Designing a dynamic balance mechanism between 'giving users what they want' and 'broadening their horizons' is the most fundamental product and technical trade-off in this scenario.
content.zh: 若個人化推薦過度依賴歷史行為，將強化既有偏好並縮窄內容面（過濾泡泡），最終降低長期互動率。設計「給使用者想要的」與「拓展視野」之間的動態平衡機制，是此應用情境最根本的產品與技術取捨。

title.en: Cold-start severity in media versus e-commerce

content.en: Media content has an extremely short lifecycle — articles need effective recommendations within hours of publication, yet almost no interaction data is available at that point. This cannot be solved by collaborative filtering alone; content features must serve as initial signals, complemented by bandit-style online learning for rapid adaptation.
content.zh: 媒體內容的生命週期極短——文章需要在發布後數小時內獲得有效推薦，而此時幾乎沒有互動資料可用。這不能單靠協同過濾解決；必須以內容特徵作為初始訊號，輔以老虎機式線上學習進行快速適應。

title.en: RAG reliability ceiling determined by retrieval quality
title.zh: RAG可靠性上限由檢索品質決定

content.en: In generative Q&A workflows, hallucination is often over-emphasised; in practice, the more common failure mode is 'retrieving the wrong passage, upon which the LLM faithfully produces an incorrect answer.' The priority for improving system reliability should be: ensure retrieval precision first, then optimise generation.
content.zh: 在生成式問答工作流程中，幻覺問題往往被過度強調；實際上更常見的失敗模式是「檢索到錯誤段落，LLM在此基礎上忠實地生成了錯誤答案」。提升系統可靠性的優先順序應為：先確保檢索精確度，再優化生成品質。

title.en: Citation alignment as a trust bottleneck
title.zh: 引用對齊作為信任瓶頸

content.en: Ensuring the model 'says A, cites A' does not happen automatically; an explicit attribution mechanism must be designed into the generation stage, and citation-answer correspondence must be independently verified during evaluation. Without this layer, sporadic citation errors will rapidly erode user trust.
content.zh: 確保模型「說A、引用A」不會自動發生；必須在生成階段設計明確的歸因機制，並在評估時獨立驗證引用與答案的對應關係。若缺乏這一層，偶發的引用錯誤將迅速侵蝕使用者信任。

title.en: Push notification as a scarce, non-recoverable resource
title.zh: 推播通知是稀缺且不可恢復的資源

content.en: Once a user revokes notification permission, the channel is permanently lost. Push strategy must treat 'do not disturb' as an optimisation objective on equal footing with click-through rate, and design dynamic frequency control based on each user's historical response patterns rather than relying on fixed rules.
content.zh: 一旦使用者撤銷通知權限，該管道便永久失去。推播策略必須將「不打擾」視為與點擊率同等重要的優化目標，並根據每位使用者的歷史回應模式設計動態頻率控制，而非依賴固定規則。

description.en: AI solutions to improve the utilisation of unsold ad inventory and deliver more relevant ads to the right audiences, thereby increasing overall revenue efficiency.
description.zh: AI解決方案，旨在提升未售出廣告庫存的利用率，並向適當受眾投放更相關的廣告，從而提高整體營收效率。

displayName.zh: 使用者行為與瀏覽資料

items.en: Anonymous and authenticated browsing signals: reading topics, dwell time, visit frequency, source/referral paths
items.zh: 匿名與已驗證的瀏覽訊號：閱讀主題、停留時間、訪問頻率、來源/引薦路徑

items.en: A 90-day rolling window is a common baseline; users with shorter histories will have significantly lower segmentation quality
items.zh: 90天滾動視窗是常見基準；歷史記錄較短的使用者分群品質將顯著較低

displayName.zh: 使用者身份與註冊資料

items.en: Login status and first-party identity graph to enable cross-session behaviour linkage, especially critical as third-party cookies phase out
items.zh: 登入狀態與第一方身份圖譜，實現跨工作階段行為連結，在第三方Cookie淘汰的背景下尤為關鍵

items.en: Self-reported demographic data (job title, industry, interests); note that completion rates are typically low
items.zh: 自我申報的人口統計資料（職稱、行業、興趣）；注意完填率通常偏低

displayName.zh: 廣告庫存與活動績效資料

items.en: Historical fill rates, CPM/CPC by placement, campaign delivery logs, and unsold inventory records
items.zh: 歷史填充率、各版位CPM/CPC、活動投放日誌與未售出庫存記錄

items.en: Real-time inventory availability signals for latency-sensitive backfill operations
items.zh: 用於延遲敏感的填充操作的即時庫存可用性訊號

items.en: Data Management Platform capable of receiving audience segments and applying them as targeting filters in ad serving
items.zh: 能夠在廣告投放中接收受眾分群並將其作為定向篩選條件的資料管理平台

items.en: Integration path between the segmentation model output and the ad server or SSP for real-time decisioning
items.zh: 分群模型輸出與廣告伺服器或SSP之間的整合路徑，用於即時決策

items.en: Multi-dimensional creative assets (image, copy, video) with version tracking for audience-specific combinations
items.zh: 多維度創意素材（圖像、文案、影片），附版本追蹤以供受眾特定組合使用

items.en: Quality-control mechanism for AI-generated creatives to ensure visual and tonal consistency across variants
items.zh: AI生成創意的品質管控機制，確保各變體之間視覺和語調的一致性

modellingProcess.en: Behavioural feature engineering (attention proxy), demographic enrichment, audience clustering, DMP segment creation with reach-precision trade-off management
modellingProcess.zh: 行為特徵工程（注意力代理指標）、人口統計豐富化、受眾聚類、附觸及-精確度取捨管理的DMP分群建立

modelOutput.en: Describable audience segments for ad targeting, pricing negotiation, and custom audience-insight reports
modelOutput.zh: 用於廣告定向、定價談判和自訂受眾洞察報告的可描述受眾分群

modellingProcess.en: Multi-dimensional creative combination generation, audience × creative matching, joint optimisation of placement / content version / timing
modellingProcess.zh: 多維度創意組合生成、受眾×創意匹配、版位/內容版本/時機的聯合優化

modelOutput.en: Optimised creative–audience combinations with performance predictions and explainability annotations
modelOutput.zh: 優化的創意-受眾組合，附績效預測和可解釋性標注

modellingProcess.en: Real-time inventory monitoring, unfilled-placement pattern detection, automated backfill ad assignment with latency-aware triggering
modellingProcess.zh: 即時庫存監控、未填充版位模式偵測、具延遲感知觸發的自動回填廣告分配

modelOutput.en: Automated backfill recommendations that re-monetise unsold placements before the impression window closes
modelOutput.zh: 在曝光視窗關閉前重新貨幣化未售出版位的自動回填建議

title.en: Structural trade-off between precision and reach
title.zh: 精確度與觸及率之間的結構性取捨

content.en: The finer the audience segments, the more creative versions, and the stricter the targeting filters, the smaller the sample size per decision unit becomes. There is no solution that simultaneously maximises targeting precision and delivery scale — only explicit trade-offs under defined business objectives.
content.zh: 受眾分群越細、創意版本越多、定向篩選越嚴格，每個決策單元的樣本量就越小。沒有一個解決方案能同時最大化定向精確度和投放規模——只有在明確的業務目標下進行顯式取捨。

title.en: Identity resolution and cold-start under cookie deprecation
title.zh: Cookie淘汰下的身份解析與冷啟動

content.en: Unauthenticated users cannot have their behaviour linked across sessions, and this problem will worsen as third-party cookies continue to phase out. Building a first-party identity graph through registration incentives is a prerequisite for sustainable audience-data capability.
content.zh: 未驗證的使用者無法跨工作階段連結其行為，隨著第三方Cookie持續淘汰，這個問題將更加嚴重。透過註冊激勵建立第一方身份圖譜，是構建可持續受眾資料能力的前提條件。

title.zh: 特徵工程中代理標籤的因果性

content.en: Attention metrics are composite scores; if signals generated after ad exposure are mixed into the design, the metric circularly defines what it attempts to predict. The model then learns historical delivery bias rather than genuine content-engagement behaviour.
content.zh: 注意力指標是複合分數；若廣告曝光後產生的訊號被混入設計中，該指標將循環定義其試圖預測的內容。模型隨後學習的是歷史投放偏差，而非真正的內容互動行為。

title.zh: 創意優化中的組合爆炸

content.en: Multi-dimensional creative combinations (image × copy × video × audience segment) grow explosively and exceed the capacity for manual review. With fine audience segments and many creative variants, exposure per combination becomes sparse, and statistical signals are insufficient.
content.zh: 多維度創意組合（圖像×文案×影片×受眾分群）呈爆炸式增長，超出人工審查的能力範圍。在受眾分群細和創意變體多的情況下，每個組合的曝光量變得稀少，統計訊號不足。

title.en: Real-time latency sensitivity in inventory recovery
title.zh: 庫存回收中的即時延遲敏感性

content.en: Real-time data analysis and pattern recognition for unsold inventory are sensitive to pipeline latency; if detection of unfilled placements is delayed too long, the remediation mechanism activates after the impression window has already closed.
content.zh: 未售出庫存的即時資料分析和模式識別對管線延遲非常敏感；若未填充版位的偵測延遲過長，修復機制會在曝光視窗已關閉後才啟動。

description.en: Machine learning can help optimise the timing, content, and presentation of paywalls while identifying optimal pricing strategies to improve conversion rates.
description.zh: 機器學習可幫助優化付費牆的時機、內容和呈現方式，同時識別最佳定價策略以提升轉換率。

displayName.zh: 使用者行為與工作階段資料

items.en: Page-view sequences, article read counts, dwell time, visit frequency, referral sources, and device type
items.zh: 頁面瀏覽序列、文章閱讀次數、停留時間、訪問頻率、引薦來源與裝置類型

items.en: Behavioural sequences of sufficient length for reliable intent inference; new or low-frequency visitors will have significantly lower prediction accuracy
items.zh: 足夠長度的行為序列以進行可靠的意圖推斷；新訪客或低頻訪客的預測精確度將顯著較低

items.en: Historical subscription events (sign-up date, plan type, renewal/cancellation timestamps) to serve as positive labels for propensity modelling
items.zh: 歷史訂閱事件（註冊日期、方案類型、續訂/取消時間戳），作為傾向建模的正向標籤

items.en: Expect severe class imbalance: subscribers represent an extremely small fraction of total users, requiring careful label design and sampling strategies
items.zh: 預計存在嚴重的類別不平衡：訂閱者佔總使用者的比例極低，需要謹慎的標籤設計和採樣策略

items.en: Randomised experiment framework capable of assigning users to control/treatment groups for paywall timing and pricing variants
items.zh: 能夠將使用者分配至付費牆時機和定價變體的對照組/實驗組的隨機實驗框架

items.en: Essential for causal validation; without randomised experiments, the system cannot distinguish whether paywall timing drives conversion or merely correlates with pre-existing purchase intent
items.zh: 因果驗證所必需；若無隨機實驗，系統無法區分付費牆時機驅動轉換，還是僅與既有購買意圖相關

items.en: Ability to dynamically control paywall display rules (trigger point, frequency, messaging) from model output in real time
items.zh: 能夠從模型輸出即時動態控制付費牆顯示規則（觸發點、頻率、訊息）的功能

items.en: Integration with the subscription management system to feed conversion and retention outcomes back into the model loop
items.zh: 與訂閱管理系統整合，將轉換和留存結果回饋至模型循環

displayName.en: Legal & Compliance Review for Dynamic Pricing
displayName.zh: 動態定價的法律與合規審查

items.en: Pre-assessment of regulatory requirements in target markets regarding personalised pricing (price discrimination laws vary by jurisdiction)
items.zh: 對目標市場中個人化定價（各司法管轄區的價格歧視法律有所不同）的監管要求進行事前評估

items.en: Awareness that users can trivially compare prices with one another, creating trust risk even where dynamic pricing is legally permissible
items.zh: 注意使用者可以輕易相互比較價格，即使動態定價在法律上允許，也會帶來信任風險

modellingProcess.en: Propensity scoring with class-imbalance handling, real-time session intent inference, A/B-validated trigger-point selection, conversion–churn trade-off modelling
modellingProcess.zh: 附類別不平衡處理的傾向評分、即時工作階段意圖推斷、A/B驗證的觸發點選擇、轉換-流失取捨建模

modelOutput.en: Per-user paywall trigger rules (timing, frequency, messaging variant) with causal conversion-lift estimates
modelOutput.zh: 每位使用者的付費牆觸發規則（時機、頻率、訊息變體），附因果轉換提升估算

useCases.referenceCase: The Globe and Mail AI Paywall Optimisation

modellingProcess.en: Price-elasticity estimation, willingness-to-pay modelling, fairness-constrained optimisation, randomised price experiments
modellingProcess.zh: 價格彈性估算、支付意願建模、公平性約束優化、隨機定價實驗

modelOutput.en: Personalised pricing recommendations with compliance guardrails and trust-risk flags
modelOutput.zh: 個人化定價建議，附合規護欄和信任風險標記

modellingProcess.en: Survival analysis for time-to-churn modelling, sequence models for pre-churn signal detection, uplift modelling for intervention effectiveness, A/B-validated discount offers
modellingProcess.zh: 流失時間建模的存活分析、流失前訊號偵測的序列模型、干預效果的提升建模、A/B驗證的折扣優惠

modelOutput.en: Churn-risk scores with recommended intervention actions and causally validated lift estimates
modelOutput.zh: 流失風險評分，附推薦干預行動和因果驗證的提升估算

title.en: Short-term conversion versus long-term retention trade-off
title.zh: 短期轉換與長期留存的取捨

content.en: Both paywall timing and pricing optimisation easily fall into the trap of targeting short-term conversion rates. A high conversion rate does not guarantee a high retention rate; overly aggressive intervention strategies may boost subscription numbers in the short term while accumulating long-term user attrition.
content.zh: 付費牆時機和定價優化都很容易陷入以短期轉換率為目標的陷阱。高轉換率不能保證高留存率；過於激進的干預策略可能在短期內提升訂閱數量，同時積累長期使用者流失。

content.en: Whether through dynamic paywalls or dynamic pricing, the higher the degree of personalisation, the more visible the differential treatment of different users becomes. This creates sustained friction across two dimensions: legal compliance and user trust.
content.zh: 無論是動態付費牆還是動態定價，個人化程度越高，對不同使用者的差別對待就越顯著。這在兩個維度上造成持續摩擦：法律合規和使用者信任。

title.en: Causal identification — correlation versus intervention effect
title.zh: 因果識別——相關性與干預效果

content.en: A system may observe that showing a paywall after the third article yields the highest conversion rate. However, this correlation rests on an unverified assumption: that the paywall caused the subscription, rather than that users willing to read three articles already had higher purchase intent.
content.zh: 系統可能觀察到在第三篇文章後顯示付費牆能獲得最高轉換率。然而，這種相關性建立在一個未經驗證的假設之上：付費牆導致了訂閱，而不是願意閱讀三篇文章的使用者本來就有更高的購買意圖。

title.en: Validating whether the intervention is effective

content.en: A/B testing is the gold standard — randomly assigning users with identical characteristics into groups is the only way to isolate the user's inherent purchase intent from the paywall intervention's effect. When sample sizes are insufficient or randomisation is infeasible, uplift modelling offers a second-best alternative.
content.zh: A/B測試是黃金標準——隨機將特徵相同的使用者分配到各組，是將使用者固有購買意圖與付費牆干預效果分離的唯一方法。當樣本量不足或無法進行隨機化時，提升建模提供了次佳選擇。

content.en: Propensity models, survival analysis, and sequence models address different aspects of timing prediction. Their common application is proactive intervention when the system detects rising churn risk. The effectiveness of such interventions must loop back to causal validation to confirm whether the discount genuinely reduced churn.
content.zh: 傾向模型、存活分析和序列模型解決了時機預測的不同方面。它們的共同應用是在系統偵測到流失風險上升時進行主動干預。此類干預的效果必須回饋至因果驗證，以確認折扣是否真正降低了流失。

name.zh: 使用者留存與終身價值

description.en: Using AI to identify subscribers at risk of churn and recommend more relevant content or products, further enhancing user lifetime value (LTV).
description.zh: 使用AI識別有流失風險的訂閱者並推薦更相關的內容或產品，進一步提升使用者終身價值（LTV）。

items.en: Reading history, click patterns, session duration, page views, engagement frequency
items.zh: 閱讀記錄、點擊模式、工作階段時長、頁面瀏覽量、互動頻率

items.en: Temporal behavioural sequences for survival analysis (login cadence, reading trends over time)
items.zh: 用於存活分析的時序行為序列（登入節奏、隨時間變化的閱讀趨勢）

items.en: Subscription status, plan type, payment history, renewal dates
items.zh: 訂閱狀態、方案類型、付款記錄、續訂日期

items.en: Historical churn events with timestamps (for model training and class imbalance handling)
items.zh: 附時間戳的歷史流失事件（用於模型訓練和類別不平衡處理）

items.en: Articles read, comments posted, columnist follows, content shares
items.zh: 已閱讀文章、發表評論、追蹤專欄作家、分享內容

items.en: Action-level logs with natural occurrence rates (for action probability estimation)
items.zh: 附自然發生率的操作層級日誌（用於行動概率估算）

items.en: Subject matter experts for defining meaningful churn signals and validating model outputs
items.zh: 用於定義有意義的流失訊號並驗證模型輸出的主題專家

items.en: Business stakeholders for LTV component decomposition and calibration of action value scores
items.zh: 用於LTV組成分解和行動價值分數校準的業務相關人員

modellingProcess.en: Survival analysis, sparse signal extraction, imbalanced sample handling, temporal risk windowing
modellingProcess.zh: 存活分析、稀疏訊號提取、不平衡樣本處理、時序風險視窗

modelOutput.en: Churn probability scores with dynamic risk windows
modelOutput.zh: 附動態風險視窗的流失概率評分

modellingProcess.en: Action probability estimation, action value scoring, multi-objective ranking fusion
modellingProcess.zh: 行動概率估算、行動價值評分、多目標排序融合

modelOutput.en: Personalised action recommendations ranked by expected value
modelOutput.zh: 按預期價值排序的個人化行動推薦

modellingProcess.en: LTV decomposition into retention probability, future payment propensity, and cross-sell opportunity; component-wise modelling and synthesis
modellingProcess.zh: LTV分解為留存概率、未來付款傾向和交叉銷售機會；組成部分建模與綜合

modelOutput.en: Composite LTV estimates per user segment with actionable levers
modelOutput.zh: 每個使用者分群的綜合LTV估算，附可行的調節槓桿

title.zh: 訊號稀疏性與時序結構

content.en: Retention prediction is fundamentally a survival analysis problem, not a standard binary classification task. User churn risk changes dynamically over time, and different users have varying 'hazard windows.' Churn events are inherently rare, creating extreme class imbalance.
content.zh: 留存預測從根本上是一個存活分析問題，而非標準的二元分類任務。使用者流失風險隨時間動態變化，不同使用者有不同的「危險視窗」。流失事件本身就很罕見，造成極端的類別不平衡。

title.zh: 不可觀測的外部流失因素

content.en: A portion of user churn is driven by external factors (competitor emergence, changes in personal financial circumstances, life events). These users may exhibit completely normal on-platform behavioural sequences before churning, making it impossible for any internal signal to predict such churn.
content.zh: 部分使用者流失是由外部因素驅動的（競爭對手出現、個人財務狀況變化、生活事件）。這些使用者在流失前可能表現出完全正常的平台內行為序列，使任何內部訊號都無法預測此類流失。

content.en: Probability estimation relies on historical behavioural data, but certain actions (e.g., commenting, following columnists) have inherently low natural occurrence rates, resulting in sparse positive samples and unreliable probability estimates.
content.zh: 概率估算依賴歷史行為資料，但某些行動（例如評論、追蹤專欄作家）本身的自然發生率就很低，導致正向樣本稀少和不可靠的概率估算。

content.en: Action probability and action value are two fundamentally different scores, and there is no single correct way to combine them. The ranking logic between high-probability, low-value actions and low-probability, high-value actions differs entirely depending on the fusion design.
content.zh: 行動概率和行動價值是兩種根本不同的分數，沒有單一正確的方法來組合它們。高概率低價值行動與低概率高價值行動之間的排序邏輯，完全取決於融合設計。

content.en: LTV is a composite metric simultaneously influenced by retention probability, future payment propensity, cross-sell opportunities, and word-of-mouth propagation. A more complete framework should decompose LTV into independently modellable components, estimate each separately, and then synthesise.
content.zh: LTV是一個複合指標，同時受留存概率、未來付款傾向、交叉銷售機會和口碑傳播的影響。更完整的框架應將LTV分解為可獨立建模的組成部分，分別估算後再綜合。
